THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, DINORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAR, RAYMOND $654.89 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $694.89, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT OF $400.01(A PART OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT THAT HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF) ON THE JUDGMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, - BY COURT - AS TO TOTAL JUDGMENT BUT NOT AS TO THE $75.00 THAT WAS FILED TO THE COST AFTER JUDGMENT - AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, RAYMOND
